statement: Persist compound learning across agent iterations through four channels: git commit history (semantic change log), progress log (chronological task outcomes), structured task state (status, criteria, pass/fail), and a knowledge file (patterns, gotchas, recent learnings). Each improvement makes future improvements easier because the knowledge base grows.

evidenceRefs.title: Building an agentic memory system for GitHub Copilot — GitHub Blog (Jan 2026)

publicSummary: Four channels of compound learning: git history, progress logs, task state, knowledge file. Each pass makes the next one better.
cautionNotes: Knowledge files need periodic pruning to prevent context bloat — compound growth can become compound noise.
